ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Discorso accademico composto, e diretto con lettera familiare all`Illustriss. e reverendiss. Sig. Monsignore Ansaldo Ansaldi Uditore di Nostro Signore Innocenzo XII. Da Monsignor Giovanni Ciampini Romano Maestro de` Brevi di Grazia.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: In the introduction the author explains that he was supposed to deliver a speech in the Academy hosted by Cardinal Ottoboni, but because he fell ill others delivered a summary of his speech. Later on, the author decided to print such speech.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
